steps.title: Place the modifier
steps.content: The clause which are skeletal muscles describes the compound subject, the fibularis longus and the brachialis. Because it is extra descriptive information, it should appear immediately after that subject and be set off with commas before the sentence continues.

steps.title: Keep the predicates intact
steps.content: C places the modifier after brachialis and then continues cleanly with are cylindrical in shape and help move. A puts the modifier after cylindrical in shape. B places it after help, interrupting the verb phrase. D splits the phrase cylindrical in shape. The answer is C.
